label: Aadhaar Card
validationMessage: Aadhaar number must be exactly 12 digits and contain only numbers.

label: PAN Card
validationMessage: PAN number must be in format ABCDE1234F.

label: Passport (India)
validationMessage: Passport number must start with a letter followed by 7 digits.

label: Voter ID
validationMessage: Voter ID must be in format ABC1234567.

label: Driving License (India)
validationMessage: Driving License must follow the format MH1420110001234.
